name: Downtown Nekketsu Story

access.notes: Western localization known as River City Ransom.

backlog.reason: Original Japanese version of one of the most influential beat-'em-up RPG hybrids ever made.

acquisition.reason: Essential Kunio-kun title and cornerstone of the River City lineage.
acquisition.notes: Contained in Double Dragon & Kunio-kun: Retro Brawler Bundle.

description: Open-ended brawler RPG where Kunio and Riki fight gangs across town.
